measurement: HR=0 shotgun per-band magnitude M(B) = landing(B) x bracket(B), measured via damage-counter reconciliation on an HR-clean SG unit
focusReason: solo recording - Isabel is the only unit (all other slots EMPTY), therefore the focus; lone Burst III => ZERO full bursts, no teammate buffs, S1 (burst-gated) never fires, burst never cast

params.atkNote: effective ATK term = staticAtk - bossDEF = 118027 - 140 = 117887. VALIDATED: NEAR bands land on the pre-registered M within 2% using 117887 (a 126879 term would put NEAR ~7.6% high). NB scripts/probe/hit-values.ts prints an effective term of ~126879 for isabel -> that helper is NOT on the scope-lock basis; disregard it for this measurement.
params.unitFormula: 117887 * 2.107 = 248378 (already the 10-pellet shot total; one dealDamage per trigger-pull)

clock.method: top-right 03:00 countdown; timer fightClock = 180 - countdown. First-DAMAGE t0 (counter 0 -> 292205) at ~video 7.5s. Task band-timeline uses the first-damage clock (fightClock ~= videoSec - 7, same convention as coreband-drake-sg.json). Band boundaries below are on that first-damage fightClock.
clock.offsetNote: my event clock = videoSec - 6 (timer); task fightClock = videoSec - 7; +1s alignment applied to band boundaries. NEAR M stable across a +/-1.5s boundary shift; MID/MIDFAR shift-sensitive at ~+/-2%.

method.primary: counter-reconciliation (SG gold standard). Ran a per-frame diff on the top-centre DAMAGE counter ROI at 60fps -> detected every damage instance (shot/rider). Read the counter VALUE at every detected event (~215 reads across the fight) -> exact per-instance delta. Summed deltas per band = window damage (cross-checks to the boundary reads and the end-screen total EXACTLY).
method.shotCount: counted damage-dealing instances per window; merges (delta > 430k, i.e. two shots caught in one frame) counted as 2; reload flats (delta ~0) skipped. Cadence a rock-steady 0.667s (1.5 pulls/s); ~2.23s (133f) reloads. WHIFFS deal 0 damage => no counter event => not counted; so M = mean damage per LANDING shot (whiffs do not depress M).
method.rider: Isabel S2 (170.58% of ATK, skill: no core, no range, crits normally) identified as a DETERMINISTIC fixed value 205,709 (non-crit) / 308,564 (crit) that sits OFF the pellet-quantized shot grid (shots step ~12,704) in every band. Subtracted from each window before the M solve.
method.bandVerification: boss apparent size/position confirmed visually at mid-window of each band: NEAR1/NEAR2 boss large/close, FAR boss smallest/most distant, MID boss medium & off to the right, MIDFAR intermediate -> ordering matches the labels and the landing story (far = most pellet spread).

riderFinding.skill: S2 - Affects 5 enemies with highest DEF, deals 170.58% of final ATK as damage (solo: hits 1 target = boss)
riderFinding.trigger: TIME-BASED, period ~14.7s (NOT per-magazine; fires mid-magazine or mid-reload independent of ammo state)
riderFinding.critRate: ~15-25% (3 crits observed among ~12 riders; consistent with base 15%)
riderFinding.countObserved: 8 non-crit + 3 crit clearly resolved (ft 16.9,31.6c,46.3,61.1,75.8,90.5,105.1,119.9c,134.6,149.4,164.1c) + ~1 in the excluded tail => ~12 total
riderFinding.simGap: sim (hit-values) fires this rider ONCE (n=1); reality fires it ~12x -> ~2.4M under-model, a large part of the sim's ~10% under-read (sim total 50.1M vs real 55.28M)

bands.bossDistance: medium, boss on the RIGHT (off-centre) - plausibly extra pellet miss from horizontal offset
bands.confidenceNote: boss off-centre; window includes the boss-intro start region; boundary-shift sensitive (0.99-1.01). NEGATIVE core residual -> mid landing 1.0 is too high (implied landing ~0.94 at core 0).
riders cleanly below near-shot range; stable across boundary shifts; MATCHES pre-reg. Positive core residual ~0.05 valid (entangled with the +0.3 range-bonus assumption).

bands.bossDistance: distant (smallest apparent boss of the fight)
bands.confidence: high on the deficit, medium on the exact value
bands.confidenceNote: many few-pellet shots (deltas down to ~89k) drag the mean well below a 0.75-landing shot; stable across shifts (0.698-0.705). Strong NEGATIVE core residual -> far landing 0.75 is too high (implied landing ~0.66 at core 0).
rider overlap; boundary-shift sensitive (0.91-0.93). Mild NEGATIVE core residual -> midfar landing 0.9 slightly too high (implied ~0.86 at core 0).
second independent NEAR window; agrees with near1 to 1.9%; stable across shifts; ~matches pre-reg. Positive core residual ~0.08 valid.

tailExcluded.note: too few shots + end-screen counter animation contaminates the diff; used only in total-closure, excluded from the fit

nearAgreement.note: two independent buff-free NEAR windows agree within 1.9% (< 4% gate) and both ~match pre-reg 1.281

shotCountClosure.note: ~206 vs ~200 predicted (+3%); consistent with steady 1.5/s minus reloads/downtime; no deficit to absorb into core

riderClosure.note: rider = fixed 205,709 / crit 308,564 on a ~14.7s period; residual fully explained

preRegComparison.verdict: SPLIT: NEAR bands match the pre-registered M within 2% (near1 +0.4%, near2 +2.3%) - this VALIDATES the method, the 117887 basis, and the near landing 0.9 + range 0.3. But MID/MIDFAR/FAR fall BELOW pre-reg (mid -6.2%, midfar -4.9%, far -12.6%), monotonically worse as the boss recedes.
preRegComparison.interpretation: A real per-band landing DEFICIT for the non-near bands on this HR-clean unit: the current landing table (mid 1.0 / far 0.75 / midfar 0.9) over-states how many pellets land at those ranges. Implied core-0 landings: mid ~0.94, midfar ~0.86, far ~0.66. NEGATIVE core residuals in mid/far/midfar -> flag a JOINT landing+core refit for those bands (do NOT clamp core to 0 or tweak landing to make core pretty). NEAR gives valid positive core ~0.05-0.08 (HR=0).

note: MEASUREMENT ONLY - no engine/override edits. M(B) is the primary MEASURED deliverable; residual core(B) is secondary (flagged convention, landing held at engine values).
